      • value: string

              | "BusOrCoach"

              | "Taxon";
      }

      Parses a urn:anbs identifier into its Schema.org type and opaque identifier components.

      Parameters

      • identifier: string

        urn:anbs identifier to parse.

      Returns {
          id: string;
          type:
              | "CommunityHealth"
              | "Dermatology"
              | "DietNutrition"
              | "Emergency"
              | "Geriatric"
              | "Gynecologic"
